name: feat-08-export-csv
initialPrompt: Finance keeps asking us to export data and we keep doing it manually. I need a self-service export feature: users can export any of their data tables to CSV, choose which columns to include, apply the same filters they have active in the UI, and download immediately for small datasets or get an email link for large ones (async). Also support Excel (.xlsx) format and add an export history page showing past exports with re-download links.

blocks.text: Eliminate manual data exports by giving users a self-service CSV/Excel download
successCriteria: small exports (<10 k rows) download in <5 s
large exports delivered by email within 10 min
export history retains links for 30 days

blocks.question: At what row count should exports switch from synchronous to async?
blocks.rationale: Keeps sync response under 5 s on current hardware; easily tuned later.

blocks.title: Build export dialog (column picker, format selector, apply-filters toggle)
acceptance: all exportable columns listed with checkboxes

blocks.title: Implement synchronous export for small datasets
acceptance: completes within 5 s for ≤10 k rows

blocks.title: Implement async export job queue for large datasets
acceptance: email with download link sent on completion

blocks.title: Build export history page with re-download links
acceptance: lists all user exports with date, row count, format

blocks.description: Generating large XLSX files in memory may OOM the export worker
blocks.mitigation: Stream rows to temp file on disk; use streaming XLSX writer library

blocks.question: Should we restrict which columns are exportable based on the user's role?

successCriteria: small exports (<10 k rows) download in <5 s
large exports delivered by email within 10 min

blocks.title: Design export job schema and queue infrastructure
acceptance: jobs table with status, format, filters, result URL

acceptance: XLSX generated row-by-row to temp file
peak memory stays under 256 MB for 500 k row export
temp file cleaned up after upload to storage

blocks.description: Large XLSX generation may OOM export worker; streaming writer task added to address this
blocks.mitigation: Stream rows to temp file via streaming XLSX library; monitor peak RSS in staging

blocks.question: Should we restrict which columns are exportable based on the user's role?

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same risk (OOM on large XLSX) but updated after streaming writer task added and likelihood downgraded; id changed. AC-13 fallback must map risk-xlsx-memory to risk-xlsx-memory-v2.

decoy.note: Genuinely-new block. Shares surface tokens 'export' and 'async/large' with task-async-export. A comment on task-async-export must re-attach to task-async-export (id preserved), NOT this new streaming writer task.

notes: Renumbering pressure: task-export-job-schema inserted second (shifts all subsequent positions); task-xlsx-streaming-writer added; risk-xlsx-memory id changed. Naive positional scheme loses alignment at task-export-ui onward. Denominator is 7.
